summary: Mephistopheles, the Dark Prince, has been stuck on a human body for a thousand years, waiting for a suitable host. He finally finds one and plans to absorb its mana to become stronger. However, he soon discovers that his host is actually a powerful dragon-human hybrid who can use magic, which complicates Mephistopheles' plans.
key_moments: Mephistopheles is stuck on a human body for a thousand years
He finds a suitable host and plans to absorb its mana
However, the host turns out to be a dragon-human hybrid who can use magic
